chapter_title.ar: باب التَّعْقِيبِ بَعْدَ الصَّلَاةِ وَ الدُّعَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – The follow up after the Salāt and the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/177)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/177)
text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) لَا تَنْسَوُا الْمُوجِبَتَيْنِ أَوْ قَالَ عَلَيْكُمْ بِالْمُوجِبَتَيْنِ فِي دُبُرِ كُلِّ صَلَاةٍ قُلْتُ وَ مَا الْمُوجِبَتَانِ قَالَ تَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْجَنَّةَ وَ تَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ النَّارِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Hareyz, from Zurara who said,

‘Abu Ja’farasws said: ‘Do not forget the two duties’, or said: ‘It is upon you with the two duties at the end of every Salāt’. I said, ‘And what are the two duties?’ Heasws said: ‘Your asking Allahazwj for the Paradise, and seeking Refuge with Allahazwj from the Fire’.
en.sarwar: 19. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Hariz from Zurarah, who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Do not forget’ - or that he said ‘you must not forget appealing before Allah after every obligatory Salah (prayer) about the two essential matters.’ I then asked, ‘What are the two essential matters?’ The Imam replied, ‘Appealing before Allah for paradise and seeking refuge with Allah against the fire.”’
